meta.description: Sidelined by runner's knee, IT band, shin splints, or Achilles pain? Trampis PT in Seneca helps runners get back to the road — pain-free. Claim your $97 eval.

offer.headline: $97 Comprehensive Evaluation
offer.detail: A 90-minute one-on-one assessment with a Doctor of Physical Therapy — normally $250.

index.title: Trampis PT — Run Without Pain Again | Seneca, SC
index.description: Sidelined by runner's knee, IT band, shin splints, or Achilles pain? Trampis PT in Seneca helps runners get back to the road — pain-free. Claim your $97 eval.

blocks.eyebrow: Seneca, SC · For runners who want to train without pain
blocks.headline: Get back to running — and hit your goals without fear of re-injury
blocks.subhead: Whether it's runner's knee, IT band, shin splints, or that Achilles that won't quit, we find what's really driving your pain and build a smart return-to-run plan around it.

blocks.headline: Stuck in the cycle of pain, rest, repeat?
blocks.body: You're not done as a runner — you just haven't found the right plan yet. If any of this sounds familiar, you're exactly who we built this for:
items: The pain returns the moment you add mileage back in
You've been told to just rest, ice, and stop running
Nobody ever looked at how you actually run
You're nervous every race that the old injury will flare

blocks.headline: If that sounds like you, we can help.
blocks.body: There's a reason the pain keeps coming back — and a clear path to running freely again.

blocks.headline: Don't let a nagging injury cost you your season

items.title: Losing the fitness you built
items.body: Every week off the road chips away at the endurance and base mileage you worked so hard to earn.

items.title: Pain that keeps returning
items.body: Rest quiets it for a few days, then it flares the second you lace up again. The loop never breaks on its own.

items.title: Watching your race goals slip
items.body: That PR, that marathon, that weekly long run — they drift further away the longer you wait to fix the real problem.

blocks.headline: Why runners choose Trampis PT
blocks.intro: We don't hand out generic stretches and tell you to stop running. We dig into your mechanics and build a plan to get you back on the road for good.

items.title: Running gait analysis
items.body: We watch how you actually move and run to find the mechanics behind your knee, shin, or Achilles pain.

items.title: A plan built for your miles
items.body: One-on-one care and a smart return-to-run progression built around your goals, your races, and your weekly mileage.

items.title: So it doesn't come back
items.body: We rebuild the strength and form that keep you running pain-free — not just until your next long run.

blocks.headline: Ready to find out what's really holding you back?
blocks.body: Your $97 eval includes a full 90-minute one-on-one assessment with a Doctor of Physical Therapy.

steps.title: Claim your $97 evaluation
steps.body: Book your 90-minute assessment online in under a minute. No referral needed.

steps.title: Get a real diagnosis & gait analysis
steps.body: We find the root cause everyone else missed and map out a return-to-run plan built for your goals.

steps.title: Get back to running stronger
steps.body: Follow the progression with a coach in your corner and return to your miles — without fear of re-injury.

blocks.headline: Seneca runners who got back on the road

items.quote: This guy rocks I love him.
Hardest working guy in America!! Justin P

items.name: Kait W
items.quote: Trampis helped me start running immediately!

blocks.headline: Your comeback starts with one call.
blocks.body: Spots for the $97 running evaluation are limited each week. Claim yours before they're gone.

blocks.headline: Claim your $97 evaluation
blocks.intro: Fill out the form and we'll be in touch to lock in your 90-minute assessment.
